the sequence {a_n} is defined by the sum of the first n terms, S_n = n² - 3n. to find a_6, we calculate the difference between S_6 and S_5.  

the value of S_6 is 6² - 3*6 = 36 - 18 = 18.  
the value of S_5 is 5² - 3*5 = 25 - 15 = 10.  

the difference between S_6 and S_5 is 18 - 10 = 8.  

the 6th term, a_6, is 8.  

the sequence {a_n} is defined by the sum of the first n terms, S_n = n² - 3n.  

the value of a_6 is 8.
